name: @ctalasila/pdf-report-generator
description: Generate professional corporate PDF reports from structured content or raw LLM output. Replicates a reference PDF's exact style — cover, typography, colors, tables, and charts.

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Generate a professional PDF report from a structured JSON spec (metadata, sections, tables, charts, images).

tools.name: generate_report_from_text
tools.description: Convert raw text or LLM chat output into a structured PDF report automatically.

tools.name: list_themes
tools.description: List available color themes for PDF reports.
